title: Hewl

{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''[…]'' I on one occasion had the misfortune to encounter him ''[Vacander]'' while tracking a group of independent bounty hunters through the infamous fog banks of Hewl's Karap Valley: you can imagine my surprise when a pair of piercing red eyes appeared from nowhere and the fog told me to keep my distance.|Addendum by Lieutenant Colonel Palpatine Essex Yerac to Rebel Alliance SecuriDex datafile on Vacander|<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />}}
'''Hewl''' was an astronomical object<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> located within the [[Hewl system/Legends|Hewl system]], a part of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Eidoloni sector/Legends|Eidoloni sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Karap Valley]] was located on Hewl, and it featured fog banks that were considered to be infamous by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Palpatine Essex Yerac]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />

At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Yerac was tracking an independent [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] group through the fog banks of Karap Valley. While there, the Rebel [[Officer/Legends|officer]] unexpectedly encountered the [[Filar-Nitzan/Legends|Filar-Nitzan]] infiltrator [[Vacander]], who told Yerac to cease the pursuit of the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]]. In a subsequent addendum to an Alliance [[SecuriDex]] [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] on Vacander, Yerac mentioned the encounter with the Filar-Nitzan on Hewl.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hewl was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Hewl [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Hewl, in grid square M-16.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
